name: 江南院落
era_style: 明代江南水乡私家园林院落
description: 精致江南小院，雪地中堆雪工具与雪球散落，中央石桌旁珠宝箱与信件，周围回廊与梅花树，地面积雪覆盖，建筑为白墙黑瓦，空间诗意而开阔。
visual_reference: Picturesque Ming dynasty Jiangnan water-town private garden courtyard exterior daytime in snow, snow-covered ground with snowball-making tools, central stone table beside jewelry box and letters, surrounding corridors and plum blossom trees, white walls black tiles architecture, poetic wintry atmosphere
atmosphere: 三年后重逢的复杂心碎
lighting: 冬日柔和散射光，雪地反光明亮
